cloudtrail.trail.insightselector.CfnAbou: A JSON string that contains a list of Insights types that are logged on a trail.

cloudtrail.trail.insightselector.Insight.Description: The type of Insights events to log on a trail. `ApiCallRateInsight` and `ApiErrorRateInsight` are valid Insight types.  The `ApiCallRateInsight` Insights type analyzes write-only management API calls that are aggregated per minute against a baseline API call volume.  The `ApiErrorRateInsight` Insights type analyzes management API calls that result in error codes. The error is shown if the API call is unsuccessful.
